prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 吉林大学在新疆理科2023年最低位次约5340名，2024年约4824名，2025年约3030名。近三年位次持续前移（数字减小），2025年较2024年前移约1800名，竞争明 显加剧。；吉林大学在新疆理科招生计划：2023年123人，2024年120人，2025年121人，2026年122人。2026年较2025 年小幅扩招1人（+0.83%），扩招幅度极小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 吉林大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第26名（2025年 第26名），排名稳定在Top30，属于国内顶尖综合性大学；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（前卫校区浴池事件）和学术不端舆情，共13条 负面事件。2025年声誉偏负面（江苏、黑龙江投档线断档）。抖音热度排名第40位（较热），综合热度约112万。历史投档异常方面，2022年河南断档、2023年投档线异常、2025 年江苏/黑龙江断档均有记录，负面舆情可能对报考心理产生一定抑制；吉林大学拥有A+学科2个（考古学、马克思主义理论），A学科5个（化学、数学、机械工 程、法学、物理学、兽医学），A-学科8个（哲学、工商管理、政治学、材料科学与工程、生物学、电子科学与技术、计算机科学与技术等），A-及以上共15个学科，学科实力雄 厚，对考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、临床医学、电子信息/通信等专业持续高热推荐，法学推荐，电气工程推荐。新疆2025年理科考生约52538人，2026年 总考生约238000人（按历史比例估算理科约163363人），考生总数大幅增加，竞争加剧。；吉林大学位于吉林省长春市，距新疆较 远，地域偏好因素可能略降低报考热度。该校在新疆招生占比约1.5%-2%（2023-2025年），属于非本省招生，跨省报考需考虑地域适应因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位 次3030名、2026年小幅扩招（+0.83%使位次略后移）、新疆考生总数大幅增加（竞争加剧使位次后移）、声誉偏负面（抑制报考使位次后移）、优势学科吸引力强（使位次前移） 等因素。考虑考生大幅增加（推高位次数字）与扩招微弱（拉低位次数字）的博弈，以及负面声誉的抑制作用，预计位次较2025年略后移。预测最 低位次约3075名，区间2637-3513名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Jilin University's minimum ranking in Xinjiang Science was approximately 5340 in 2023, 4824 in 2024, and 3030 in 2025. Over the past three years, the ranking has consistently moved forward (decreasing numbers), with a forward shift of about 1800 places from 2024 to 2025, indicating significantly intensified competition. The enrollment plan for Jilin University in Xinjiang Science: 123 in 2023, 120 in 2024, 121 in 2025, and 122 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a slight expansion of 1 student (+0.83%), which is minimal and has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 26th (26th in 2025), stable within the top 30, making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China. The 2026 reputation evaluation is significantly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (Qianwei Campus Bathhouse Incident) and academic misconduct controversies, totaling 13 negative events. The 2025 reputation was somewhat negative (with admission score drops in Jiangsu and Heilongjiang). Its Douyin popularity ranks 40th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.12 million. Historical admission anomalies include a drop in Henan in 2022, abnormal admission scores in 2023, and drops in Jiangsu/Heilongjiang in 2025, with negative public opinion potentially suppressing application psychology. Jilin University has 2 A+ disciplines (Archaeology, Marxist Theory), 5 A disciplines (Chemistry, Mathematics, Mechanical Engineering, Law, Veterinary Medicine), and 8 A- disciplines (Philosophy, Business Administration, Political Science, Materials Science and Engineering, Biology, Electronic Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, etc.), totaling 15 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, Electronic Information/Communication, and other majors remain highly recommended, along with Law and Electrical Engineering. In 2025, there are approximately 52,538 Science candidates in Xinjiang, and in 2026, the total number of candidates is about 238,000 (estimated Science candidates around 163,363 based on historical proportions), with a significant increase in total candidates, intensifying competition. Jilin University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, far from Xinjiang, and geographical preference factors may slightly reduce application enthusiasm. The university's enrollment proportion in Xinjiang is about 1.5%-2% (2023-2025), making it a non-provincial enrollment, and cross-province applications require consideration of geographical adaptation factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3030, the slight expansion in 2026 (+0.83% causing a slight backward shift in ranking), the significant increase in Xinjiang candidate numbers (intensifying competition causing a backward shift in ranking), the negative reputation (suppressing applications causing a backward shift in ranking), and the strong appeal of advantageous disciplines (causing a forward shift in ranking), among other factors. Taking into account the game between the large increase in candidates (pushing the ranking number higher) and the minimal expansion (pulling the ranking number lower), as well as the suppressive effect of negative reputation, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3075, with a range of 2637-3513.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (2637-3513), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch goal, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2637), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine 5+3, Stomatology, and Computer Science. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 3000), prioritize Tier 2 majors like Mathematics, Electrical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, and Communication Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>3513), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Jilin University's minimum ranking for liberal arts in Xinjiang was approximately 444th in 2023, about 3567th in 2024 (abnormally large backward shift), and about 763rd in 2025. Rankings fluctuated greatly, with an abnormal gap in 2024 (ranking dropped sharply from 444 to 3567), and a significant recovery to 763rd in 2025. Jilin University's enrollment plan for liberal arts in Xinjiang: 15 students in 2023, 17 in 2024, 15 in 2025, and 14 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 1 student (-6.67%), a noticeable reduction, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranks 26th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to top-tier comprehensive universities in China, with strong liberal arts strength (Law A, Political Science A-, Philosophy A-, etc.). In 2026, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents and academic misconduct public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 40th (relatively hot). In 2025, reputation was negative (Jiangsu, Heilongjiang admission score gaps). Negative public opinion may have some inhibitory effect on application psychology, but as a long-established 985 comprehensive university, Jilin University has deep liberal arts foundations and overall strong appeal. Jilin University's advantageous liberal arts disciplines: Law A, Marxist Theory A+, Philosophy A-, Political Science A-, Archaeology A+, Business Administration A-, etc., with outstanding disciplinary strength, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is continuously recommended (recommended in 2024, recommended in 2023), Chinese Language and Literature recommended. In 2025, Xinjiang had about 24,010 liberal arts candidates; in 2026, total candidates about 238,000 (estimated liberal arts about 74,637 based on historical proportion), with a significant increase in total candidates, intensifying competition. Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, far from Xinjiang. Its liberal arts enrollment in Xinjiang is small (14-17 students per year), belonging to small-scale enrollment, making rankings susceptible to fluctuations due to individual high-scoring candidates' application behavior.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 763rd, 2026 enrollment reduction (-6.67% causing ranking to move forward/number to decrease), significant increase in Xinjiang liberal arts candidates (intensified competition causing ranking to move backward/number to increase), and negative reputation, etc. The enrollment reduction moves the ranking forward by about 30 places, but the significant increase in candidates and negative reputation offset part of the forward effect. Considering the 2024 gap and the significant recovery in 2025, the 2026 ranking is expected to move slightly backward from 732nd. Predicted minimum ranking about 747th, range 641-853rd.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<641), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Law (Jilin University's flagship A-level discipline) and Chinese Language and Literature. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 750), focus on Tier 2 majors like Political Science and Public Administration and English.
